news.title: Psychologists Say Patients Are Bringing AI Into Therapy Sessions: Survey
news.summary: A new APA survey found that more than a third of psychologists have patients using AI as an additional mental health professional, even as clinicians warn that the technology can reinforce delusions.

news.title: Crypto market treads thin ice following Warsh FOMC, Trump Iran comments
